matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite, at the cost of 27% of this kit's damage.

metaBuilds.title: Magical DPS Carry
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 24 — about 158 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.0× the sustained auto DPS: try Orion over Prophecy (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Steel deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 27% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Aurora deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 34% of its bite, at the cost of 27% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale. Zarus's main threat is Coliseum; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite, at the cost of 27% of this kit's damage.
